name: stockyard-modelswitch
description: Smart model routing based on token count, prompt patterns, and headers. Route complex queries to GPT-4o and simple ones to GPT-4o-mini.

tools.name: modelswitch_stats
tools.description: Get routing statistics: requests per model, cost per route, A/B test results.

tools.name: modelswitch_rules
tools.description: List current routing rules and their match counts.

tools.name: modelswitch_test
tools.description: Test which model a prompt would be routed to.

tools.name: modelswitch_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the ModelSwitch proxy is running and healthy.
